title: Multiple Choice
instructions: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.

questions.question: What is the main reason wildlife has recovered in the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone?
Why is the Red Forest important in the passage?

options.A: It shows the initial destructive impact of radiation
options.B: It is the safest part of the exclusion zone
options.C: It was created as a conservation experiment

questions.question: Why is the greater spotted eagle significant?

options.A: It is common in urban areas
options.B: It feeds only on contaminated animals
options.C: It is globally endangered and sensitive to disturbance
options.D: It was introduced by scientists in 1998

questions.question: What may explain the darker colour of tree frogs in the zone?
What is the author’s final position?

options.A: Nuclear accidents are useful for conservation
options.C: Chernobyl provides a complex lesson about disaster and resilience
options.D: Human activity has no effect on biodiversity
